title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Forever 21 India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Forever 21 India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Forever 21 India South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Forever 21 India South Asia Partners:
Forever 21 India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Forever 21 India South Asia Partners!
